Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Interface TerminalProgramElement

All Superinterfaces:
ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
All Known Subinterfaces:
IForUpdates, ILoopInit, IProgramVariable, Label, MethodName, ProgramConstruct
All Known Implementing Classes:
Abstract, AbstractIntegerLiteral, AnnotationUseSpecification, BooleanLiteral, CharLiteral, DoubleLiteral, EmptyMapLiteral, EmptySeqLiteral, EmptySetLiteral, EmptyStatement, Final, FloatLiteral, ForUpdates, FreeLiteral, Ghost, IntLiteral, Literal, LocationVariable, LongLiteral, LoopInit, Model, Modifier, Native, NoState, NullLiteral, Private, ProgramConstant, ProgramElementName, ProgramSV, ProgramVariable, Protected, Public, RealLiteral, Static, StrictFp, StringLiteral, Synchronized, Transient, TwoState, VariableNamer.IndProgramElementName, VisibilityModifier, Volatile
public interface TerminalProgramElement extends ProgramElement
Terminal program element. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
